    mut id : U32
namespace:
    func clone(shallow self: nng_ctx) returns shallow nng_ctx
    func delete(own self: nng_ctx, shallow call_free: Bool)

    func eq(shallow self: nng_ctx, shallow other: nng_ctx) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(shallow self: nng_ctx) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    func size() returns shallow U32
}

:PROPERTIES:

:group: Vendor bindings

#+begin_src til
struct nng_thread {
namespace:
